title: Add PromptArt to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PromptArt](https://t.me/promptart_ai_bot) to bots
- PromptArt is a Telegram bot for AI image generation aimed at non-technical users. Users describe an image in plain English, optionally pick a style preset (photorealistic / anime / cyberpunk / oil pai

Fixes #10563

gist.headline: New bot in the garden: PromptArt
gist.blurb: PromptArt just landed in the community greenhouse! It's a Telegram bot that turns plain English into stunning AI images with easy style presets.
gist.summary: Added PromptArt, a Telegram bot for AI image generation featuring photorealistic, anime, cyberpunk, and oil painting presets, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use the PromptArt Telegram bot to easily generate styled images without needing complex prompt engineering.
gist.visual_concept: A Telegram bot focused on art. Visuals should include a paper airplane (Telegram metaphor), art supplies like a canvas or palette, and Polly the bee interacting with a friendly robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, flying next to a chunky retro robot holding a paper airplane and a glowing canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, flying next to a chunky retro robot holding a paper airplane and a glowing canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
